title: Suppress Legacy Closed Ref Continuations
goal: Stop role-less legacy archived continuations from becoming active autopilot work when all tracked refs are externally closed.
non_goals: Do not delete or rewrite old archives.
Do not assume GitHub inside core planning.
Do not suppress archives with missing, open, or reopened refs.

intent.outcome: Legacy historical archives with all known-closed refs stay inspection evidence instead of blocking the next live lane.
intent.constraints: Use provider-neutral external evidence and keep open/missing refs active.
intent.latitude: Extend finished-work inspection suppression and tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if suppression would hide a candidate without closed external proof.

execution.next_step: Archive, commit/push, close #527, refresh evidence, then reingest.
execution.proof: planning package tests, planning lint, planning doctor, proof selector

invariants: Legacy role-less suppression requires all tracked refs to be known closed.
Reopened evidence must keep attention pressure.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Remove small package-use friction discovered during dogfooding.

required_continuation.activation trigger: Continue remaining workflow-friction-polish issues after #527 closes.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Old role-less archive residue stops outranking live issue lanes when external evidence proves all tracked refs are closed.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Other workflow-friction-polish issues and broader planning maturity.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Reopened evidence is inspection pressure but does not always drive execution readiness in small fixtures; #527 only needs it to remain visible and unsuppressed.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Planning package tests, planning lint, planning surface check, proof selector, summary, and planning doctor pass.

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Continue planned work while removing dogfooding friction that blocks routing.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Implement #527 because summary still promotes old role-less closed-ref archive continuations.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm open, missing, or reopened refs are not suppressed.

execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any broad rewrite of finished-work inspection.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Root CLI or roadmap maturity code.

stop_conditions.stop when: #527 acceptance is met, validated, archived, committed, pushed, closed, and evidence refreshed.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: If a legacy candidate lacks enough external evidence to classify safely.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: If implementation starts rewriting old archives.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: If open or missing refs are suppressed.

context_budget.live working set: finished-work inspection code, planning package tests, active execplan.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update this execplan with proof and closeout.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: summary and external evidence already run.

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package; commit/push per milestone; stay on current branch.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact metadata name and focused test shape.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Suppression would depend on host-specific evidence.

immediate_next_action: Extend provider-neutral closed-ref suppression to role-less tracked refs.
invariants: Missing external evidence remains active pressure.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: For legacy role-less archives only, all tracked refs known closed is enough to suppress active continuation promotion.
open_questions_to_close: Should reopened_by block legacy closed-ref suppression?
validation_commands: cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .
completion_criteria: Legacy archived continuation candidates with all tracked refs externally closed no longer become top autopilot recommendations.
Open, missing, or reopened refs still preserve pressure.
Detailed inspection records the suppression reason.

execution_run.what happened: Extended finished-work inspection closed-ref suppression to legacy role-less candidates by using tracked_refs only when reference roles are absent and every tracked ref is known closed in provider-neutral external evidence. Added tests for all-closed legacy refs, open/missing refs, and reopened refs.
execution_run.scope touched: planning package finished-work inspection logic, planning package tests, planning state, and active execplan
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/suppress-legacy-closed-ref-continuations.plan.json packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Remove stale historical pressure without making archives ordinary startup input.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does summary recover to live work after stale legacy archives are suppressed?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #527 is implemented and validated, while the broader workflow-friction-polish lane still has other open issues.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py covers all-closed legacy suppression plus open/missing/reopened negative cases.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Summary again promotes a role-less legacy archive whose tracked refs are all externally closed.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Legacy archive suppression must handle pre-role-reference plans using provider-neutral tracked-ref status.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Otherwise historical residue keeps blocking live issue lanes after closed-ref suppression lands.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: Already promoted into planning package behavior and tests.
